pycmplot
  • API Reference
  • pycmplot.io
  • View page source

pycmplot.io

Handles loading and pre-processing of summary statistics files. Auto-detects delimiters and resolves non-standard column names to the canonical names used internally by pycmplot.

pycmplot.io.detect_delimiter(file_path: str, sample_size: int = 5000)[source]
pycmplot.io.generate_random_string(length)[source]
pycmplot.io.get_file_header(file_path: str, delim: str | None = None, dialect=None) → list[str][source]
pycmplot.io.get_output_paths(labels, mode: str | None = 'lm', logp: bool = False, output_dir: str | None = '.', plot_title: str | None = None, output_format: str | None = 'png')[source]
pycmplot.io.get_sumstats_and_merged_sector_list(sum_stats: list[str], labels: list[str], logp: bool = False, trim_pval: float | None = None, file_info: dict | None = None, sort_tracks: str | None = 'chrom_len', table_out: str | None = None, signif_threshold: float | None = None, signif_line: float | None = None, suggest_threshold: float | None = None, resources: ResourceConfig | None = None)[source]
pycmplot.io.prep_pycmplot_input_info(sum_stats: list[str], labels: list[str], buildc: str | None = None, build: list[str] = None, delim: str | None = None, chrom: str | None = None, pos: str | None = None, snp: str | None = None, pcol: str | None = None)[source]
pycmplot.io.resolve_delimiter(delim: str) → str[source]
pycmplot.io.smart_open(file_path: str)[source]
pycmplot.io.strip_comma_separated_input_streams(sum_stats, labels, colors_raw='steelblue,grey', track_heights=None, builds=None)[source]
